dict.string:
Live Context Sync — gathers several kinds of data from the Health app and hands each one to the Scriptable script "Live Context Bridge" for the Live Context widget.
Three independent sections run one after another: 1. Steps — totals today's step count. 2. Activity — totals today's exercise minutes. 3. Sleep — totals recent sleep and converts it to minutes.
Each section builds its own Dictionary and runs the Scriptable script in the background with Run in App turned off. Sections are independent, so an empty or zero result in one section does not stop the others.
Runs with no input and shows no interface. Safe to run manually or from an hourly Personal Automation.
Note: a fourth section for the next upcoming alarm was intentionally left out because the Find Alarms action has no confirmed settings available to build against.

Shortcuts generated by Shortcuts Playground. May contain mistakes. Always check the shortcut's actions first.
This shortcut was created via the following user prompt:
> Build one shortcut named "Live Context Sync" that feeds several kinds of data to the Scriptable script "Live Context Bridge". Four independent sections: Steps (today's steps summed), Activity (today's exercise minutes summed), Sleep (last 24 hours of sleep summed and converted to minutes), and Next alarm (the next upcoming alarm formatted as ISO 8601). Each section builds a Dictionary and calls the Scriptable Run Script action targeting "Live Context Bridge" with that dictionary as the input parameter and Run in App disabled. No input, no UI.

--- SECTION 1: STEPS --- - Find Health Samples returns Steps samples where Start Date is today, so the total covers midnight through now and never reaches back into yesterday. - Get Details of Health Sample reads each sample's Value. - Steps Total starts at zero and collects the running total.

- Repeat with Each walks the list of step values from Get Details of Health Sample above. - Current Step Value holds the Repeat Item for this pass. - Calculate adds Current Step Value into Steps Total each pass.

--- SECTION 2: ACTIVITY --- - Find Health Samples returns Exercise Minutes samples where Start Date is today, so the total covers midnight through now and never reaches back into yesterday. - Get Details of Health Sample reads each sample's Value. - Activity Total starts at zero and collects the running total.

- Repeat with Each walks the list of exercise values from Get Details of Health Sample above. - Current Exercise Value holds the Repeat Item for this pass. - Calculate adds Current Exercise Value into Activity Total each pass.

--- SECTION 3: SLEEP --- - Find Health Samples returns Sleep samples from about the last day. - Get Details of Health Sample reads each sample's Duration. - Sleep Seconds starts at zero and collects the running total in seconds.

- Repeat with Each walks the list of sleep durations from Get Details of Health Sample above. - Current Sleep Seconds holds the Repeat Item for this pass. - Calculate adds Current Sleep Seconds into Sleep Seconds each pass.
- Sleep Minutes converts the total sleep seconds into minutes. - Dictionary sends type set to sleep and minutes set to Sleep Minutes.
